class.name: GLTFModelInstance
class.description: GLTFModelInstance represents an instance of a [GLTFModel] on a [GLTFNode]. Each node may contain its own model instance, which references a model by index in the [GLTFState]. The model instance allows the instance to be customized, while still referencing the shared data of the model, in a similar way to Godot's "Editable Children" feature of a scene instance.

method.name: from_dictionary
method.description: Converts the given [Dictionary] representing the JSON of a glTF model instance to a [GLTFModelInstance].

method.name: to_dictionary
method.description: Serializes this [GLTFModelInstance] into a [Dictionary] of the JSON representation of the model instance.

members.member: The index of the [GLTFModel] in the [GLTFState] that this instance references.
